name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes delayed payments. We automate anomaly detection and submission instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Inaccurate expense reporting leading to delayed payments.
